name: Risotto, Saffron with Sea Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and ginger; sauté until onion is translucent but not browned.
3. Add rice and stir to coat with butter.
4. Pour in wine and increase heat. Cook, stirring, until the wine is almost absorbed.
5. Gradually add broth (about 1/2 cup at a time), waiting for each portion to be absorbed before adding more.
6. Continue this process until all the broth has been absorbed; it should take about 15 minutes.
7. While adding the last of the broth, steep saffron in some broth and incorporate it into the rice during one of the additions.
8. Remove from heat. The rice should be creamy with a light crunch in the center of the kernels.
9. Add scallops and cook for just a few moments until heated through but not overcooked.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve immediately.
